content: We can reframe the original task-specific Self-Refine framework as a backbone to instantiate multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid system where Self-Refine's iterative no-training feedback loop anchors consistent refinement across multiple inconsistent problem-solving perspectives. This hybrid approach retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision while leveraging the perspective diversity that makes modern self-reflection mechanisms more robust to blind spots.
